name: Kaarkog, Silverback Kaarkog
senses: darkvision 60 ft., low-light vision, sense the masses;
melee: bite +35 (11d10+32 P) or gore +35 (11d10+32 P; critical knockdown) or slam +35 (11d10+32 B plus grab)
offensive_abilities: ferocious charge, primal drums (DC 25), spiked hide (8d6+32 P), trample (11d10+32 B, DC 25)

special_abilities.name: Primal Drums (Su)
special_abilities.description: As a standard action, a silverback kaarkog rears up on their hind legs and beats their chest, letting out a howl that shows off their impressive fangs. Creatures within 100 feet who can see or hear them must succeed at a DC 25 Will save or be shaken for 1d6 rounds. A creature cannot be affected by the same kaarkog’s primal drums for 24 hours. This is an emotion, fear, mind-affecting, and sense-dependent effect.

description: Silverback kaarkogs roam high in the Shulith Mountains and petrified forests on Mount Zemistar’s lower slopes. Elders are larger, with silver ridges on their fur and spikes.

Special Abilities
Primal Drums (Su)
As a standard action, a silverback kaarkog rears up on their hind legs and beats their chest, letting out a howl that shows off their impressive fangs. Creatures within 100 feet who can see or hear them must succeed at a DC 25 Will save or be shaken for 1d6 rounds. A creature cannot be affected by the same kaarkog’s primal drums for 24 hours. This is an emotion, fear, mind-affecting, and sense-dependent effect.
Description
Silverback kaarkogs roam high in the Shulith Mountains and petrified forests on Mount Zemistar’s lower slopes. Elders are larger, with silver ridges on their fur and spikes.
